mapper.insert: insert into board_member(id, passwd, username, nickname) values(#{id}, sha2(#{passwd},512),#{userName}, #{nickName})
mapper.select: select no,username,nickname from board_member where id = #{id} and passwd = sha2(#{passwd},512)
select * from board_member where ${kind} like concat('%',#{search},'%')
mapper.update: update board_member set passwd = sha2(#{passwd},512), username = #{userName}, nickname = #{nickName} where no = #{no}
